perConstituentAuthority.constituent: expected pools[].{a,b,q1,c,d} values (measurement; ns-eel2 tier-1 sources define the required behavior and stay in authorityIds)

fact: The exact variable pool after each of N sequential evaluation passes of the fixture's operator-only EEL program, as computed by executing the milkdrop-eel-parser conversion verbatim over the explicit initial pool. Authority priority note: ns-eel2 (tier 1) defines the required behavior; the parser (tier 3) supplies executable measurements and may not silently override it — any observed disagreement becomes an authority-conflict record and the requirement stays FAIL until resolved.
procedure: Invoke reference adapter capability 'reference-execute-milkdrop-behavior' (ADP-MILKDROP-EEL-REFERENCE) on the fixture input; retain its JSON output as the expected artifact.
